schedule.1. Popeye: down the B column, & the top two I column boxes
schedule.8. Any Two Clusters: must mark eight boxes, free space counts
schedule.10. Winner's Choice: any two Bingos, corners or clusters count
schedule.12. No!: Down the N column & the top O
schedule.14. Punch-Out: straight Bingo, no clusters or corners
schedule.15. Winner's Choice: any two Bingos, clusters, corners count
schedule.16. Triple Winner's Choice: any three Bingos, clusters, corners count

default.current_call_style: color: black ; background-color: silver ; border-color: black ; border-radius: 8 ; border: 8px ridge
default.called_number_style: color: black ; background: white ; border: 2px solid
default.called_blink_style: color: white ; background: black ; border: 2px solid
